div.div:
Key Configurations:
- Real-time ingest via Kinesis Data Streams
- Critical alert fast-path direct to Lambda
- Encrypted storage (KMS) for all data stores
- Automatic retry & error containment (SQS DLQ)
- 30 days TTL on state table, lifecycle on S3
